title: cyclosorus peltatus
intro: Cyclosorus peltatus, also known as the leather fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The plant contains compounds with potential health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help in alleviating symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and gout. Cyclosorus peltatus is traditionally prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of tea or decoction, and it is also used in modern herbal preparations, often in combination with other medicinal plants, to enhance its therapeutic effects.
